inputs.description: Default synthetic large-context inputs bundled with the blueprint.

llm.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.

responsibilities: Review target ZIP demand and pricing signals.
Separate target and distractor market evidence.
Flag stale or noisy market facts.
Extract broker motivation and diligence signals.
Tie broker claims to source references.
Flag unsupported seller claims.
Review lender notes and DSCR constraints.
Flag financing exceptions and liquidity blockers.
Keep underwriting assumptions review-only.
Retrieve important historical facts from working memory.
Drop noisy or irrelevant facts under budget.
Preserve critical source references.
Connect rent, risk, financing, and seller signals.
Compare optimized memory with full context.
Flag decision quality gaps.
Rank candidate properties from source-grounded signals.
Explain bid, discount, or watchlist logic.
Avoid final investment advice.
Review flood, roof, insurance, and inspection risks.
Flag blockers needing diligence.
Keep risk calls tied to evidence.
Prepare the review-only acquisition memo.
Summarize ranking, evidence, and open questions.
Require human approval before action.
Keep working-memory retrieval and scoring outputs as the source of truth.
Use actors to connect property, lender, broker, rent, and diligence signals.
Keep acquisition decisions review-only and source-referenced.

memory.compression_goal: replace full-history agent handoffs with a compact source-grounded decision packet while preserving older critical facts

metadata.customizable_for: Rental acquisitions, flipping pipelines, multifamily sourcing, market expansion, diligence review, and capital-allocation meetings.
metadata.problem_solved: Property deal review depends on older broker, lender, rent, insurance, and diligence details that are easy to lose in noisy pipelines.
metadata.target_users: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.
metadata.name: Property Deal Research Assistant
metadata.description: A property deal research co-worker for comparing real-estate opportunities. Give it a target ZIP code, price ceiling, deal history, memory policy, optional broker notes, financing constraints, and an input folder for supporting files; it researches and scores opportunities, explains tradeoffs, and writes ranked review artifacts to the output folder.
metadata.llm_agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
metadata.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
metadata.target_user: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.
metadata.simulation_type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.

outputs.artifact_contract: Ranked property opportunities, source-grounded notes, and watchlist or bid recommendations for review.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.

simulation.type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.
